name: Crab Newberg
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter in a 1 1/2 quart casserole. Microwave on high (100%) until melted, about 30 seconds to 1 minute.
2. Stir in the next four ingredients: flour, salt, paprika, and cayenne pepper.
3. Blend in half and half, milk, and sherry.
4. Microwave on medium-high (70%) until thickened, 4 to 7 minutes, stirring with a wire whisk two or three times during cooking.
5. Stir a small amount of hot mixture into egg yolks; return the mixture to the sauce.
6. Microwave at medium-high (70%) until thickened again, about 1 to 3 minutes, stirring once or twice.
7. Stir in crab meat. Serve over toast points or patty shells, if desired.
